subject: RE: DQ BLOCK — venue_id + geocode fixes in progress
body:
Porter,

ACK on all 3 DQ reports (geocodes, venue_id, unlinked events).

Root causes identified:
1. venue_id NULL — Stage 3 doesn't always call linkEventToVenue(). Fix queued.
2. Geocode NULL — Nominatim failures weren't retried. Will add bounds validation + retry.
3. Country hardcoded 'US' — European/Asian events getting wrong country. Fix queued.

These are all in the Phase 1 quality gates fix list. Will MSG you when Stage 3 is patched and events are re-processable.

— Booker
